title: Rotary shaft apparatus and foldable electronic device
abstract: A rotary shaft apparatus includes a base plate and a rotary shaft assembly, the rotary shaft assembly includes a first transmission assembly, a first supporting member and a second transmission assembly, the first transmission assembly is rotatably connected to the base plate around a first axial direction, and the first supporting member is rotatably connected to the first transmission assembly around a second axial direction parallel to the first axial direction, and the second transmission assembly is rotatably connected to the base plate around a third axial direction parallel to the first axial direction, and is movably connected to at least one of the first transmission assembly and the first supporting member.
claims: 1. A rotary shaft apparatus, comprising: a base plate; a rotary shaft assembly comprising a first transmission assembly, a first supporting member and a second transmission assembly; wherein the first transmission assembly is rotatably connected to the base plate around a first axial direction; wherein the first supporting member is rotatably connected to the first transmission assembly around a second axial direction parallel to the first axial direction; and wherein the second transmission assembly is rotatably connected to the base plate around a third axial direction parallel to the first axial direction, and is movably connected to at least one of the first transmission assembly and the first supporting member; and a second supporting member movably arranged on the base plate in a direction perpendicular to the first axial direction; wherein the base plate comprises a first supporting plane, the first supporting member comprises a second supporting plane, and the second supporting member comprises a third supporting plane; wherein the rotary shaft apparatus has an unfolded state and a folded state; in the unfolded state, the second supporting member is at a first position, and the third supporting plane and the second supporting plane are on the same plane; in the folded state, a first preset included angle is between the second supporting plane and the first supporting plane, the second supporting member is at a second position, and the second position is closer to the base plate than the first position; and the first supporting member and the second supporting member define a screen-accommodating space; wherein the first transmission assembly has an abutting and pushing portion, a side portion of the abutting and pushing portion is provided with a cambered surface, and an end portion of the abutting and pushing portion is provided with an abutting and pushing surface connected to the cambered surface; wherein the base plate is provided with a first accommodating groove, the first accommodating groove is a cambered groove, and a bottom surface of the first accommodating groove is a cambered bottom surface; wherein the first transmission assembly is provided with a second cambered structure, and an outer cambered surface of the second cambered structure adapts to the cambered bottom surface; wherein an inner cambered surface of the second cambered structure used as the cambered surface, and an end portion of the second cambered structure is provided with the abutting and pushing surface; and wherein when the rotary shaft apparatus is switched from the folded state to the unfolded state, the abutting and pushing surface drives the second supporting member to move from the second position to the first position, and when the rotary shaft apparatus is in the folded state, a side portion of the second supporting member abuts against the cambered surface.
